author: Glenn R. Martin
description: Type a Typora-style [TOC] tag — or your own regex patterns, even a code-fence marker — anywhere in a note to render a live table of contents built from its headings. Choose to show it as links or hide it in Live Preview. Insert it via the command palette or right-click menu, and it stays in sync as headings change, with real links in Reading View. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Glenn R. Martin
manifest.description: Renders a live table of contents wherever you type a Typora-style [TOC] tag (or your own regex pattern). Insert it via command or right-click menu, show it as links or hide it in Live Preview, and get real clickable heading links in Reading View.
manifest.name: TOC Block

name: TOC Block

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Version bump to get past gatekeeping (didnt know to prescan, oops)

releases.author: grmartin
releases.description:
**TOC Block plugin**

Typora-style [TOC] tag rendering: configurable marker/regex detection, per-mode display (links/hidden) across Live Preview, Reading View, and PDF export, insert command + context menu item, adn live sync with the metadata cache as headings change.
releases.name: Initial Release
